mapper.select: SELECT no, user_id, id, start_at, end_at, status, created_at, updated_at FROM tutor_availability WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tutor_availability (user_id, id, start_at, end_at, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{id}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{status})

INSERT INTO tutor_availability (user_id, id, start_at, end_at, status) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.id}, #{item.startAt}, #{item.endAt}, #{item.status})
